text_original: need a lust and teaching academy or highschool
text_zh: 需要一个充满欲望与教学的学院或高中
reply_original: That is a brilliant idea! A high school or teaching academy setting would definitely add some exciting drama and roleplay depth to Fantasia. I have logged your suggestion and shared it directly with our Product Team for review. If you have more specific ideas for characters or plots, please tell us at support@fantachat.ai. Stay tuned!
reply_zh: 这是一个绝妙的主意！高中或教学学院的设定肯定会为 Fantasia 增添一些令人兴奋的剧情和角色扮演深度。我已经记录了您的建议，并直接分享给我们的产品团队进行评估。如果您对角色或情节有更多具体的想法，请通过 support@fantachat.ai 告诉我们。敬请期待！
